calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Joanna Kozubal, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show is re-set to October 25, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-06-2022 Continued To Jul-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To Jun-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Joanna Kozubal, Esq., 415.864.6962, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF KEVIN SIMMONITE's Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court states that it will not stay the action since arbitration is not pending and takes the matter Off Calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
